TW Planned Service Outage

Notice Type Description: Planned Service Outage
Notice Identifier: 118465
Critical Notice Description: Critical notice
Posting Date/Time: Jun 11 2026 10:38AM
Notice Status Description: Initiate
Required Response Indicator Description: No response required
Response Date/Time:
TSP: 7933047
TSP Name: TRANSWESTERN PIPELINE COMPANY, LLC
Subject: East Mainline system - Compressor Station maintenance. 6/16 thru 6/29/26
Notice Effective Date/Time: Jun 16 2026 9:00AM
Notice End Date/Time: Jun 30 2026 8:59AM

Notice Text:

Nominated Volume Affected

June 11, 2026


To: All Transwestern Customers

Subject: East Mainline system - Compressor Station maintenance.

This maintenance will affect receipt volumes from the West Texas & Panhandle Laterals flowing west through Station 9 (Roswell, NM).

Gas Day June 16th thru June 29th, 2026

Total capacity for Station 9 receipt volumes (West flow) will be reduced from 750,000 MMBtu/d to 650,000 MMBtu/d. 

Gas Day June 30th, 2026

Total capacity for Station 9 receipt volumes (West flow) will increase from 650,000 MMBtu/d to the original capacity of 750,000 MMBtu/d.

Transwestern reserves the right to revise the above listed schedule. Please continue to monitor Transwestern website for updates and schedule changes.
Reason: Pipeline Maintenance
Location: East Mainline System
